Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment
is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order. No opposition filed. Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter transferred to be heard in department 501 on May 27, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all breach of lease cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
